title: Spongebobs spatula
description: Adds items inspired by Spongebob squarepants
body:
This mod adds the legendary item from Spongebob Squarepantsm his spatula.
This is no ordinary spatula, it works like a sword but it deals 13 base damage and 16 with sharpness V.
**Note:The recepie has been changed, you need to make a spatula handle and head
So far mod adds:Spatula,tomato,chedar and Krabby patty**
